workout.warmup: Incline walk · 8–10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline — do not skip.
workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline. Skip if session hits 65 min.
workout.coach_note: Back-safe upper — your upper back was still tight today (6/16). All machine-based push, chest-supported pulls, no T-bar / RDL / skull crusher. After this, two full rest days (Thu/Fri) into Saturday's HIIT.

exercises.name: Chest Press Machine
exercises.note: Got 11 on set 3 at 140 last session — program 140 across all 3 sets, push for 11–12 on the last set. Machine (no DB kickback setup) — safe for the back.

exercises.name: Shoulder Press Machine (neutral grip)
exercises.note: Program 80 across all 3 sets (got 11 on set 3 last time). Keep one rep in reserve — don't stack max chest + max shoulder on the same day. Neutral grip, fixed path.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.note: Horizontal pull. Chest-supported, back-safe. Keep torso braced — if the upper back flares, drop to 120. Target is 150 once the strain fully clears.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.note: Vertical pull — pairs with the cable row. Full stretch at the top. Machine goes 120→135→150.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Rear delts + rotator cuff — great for back recovery. Elbows high and wide. Don't skip.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.note: Lead with the elbow, stop at shoulder height. Shoulders gas out on set 3 — don't force sloppy reps.

exercises.name: Arms Superset: Rope Pushdown + Hammer Curl
exercises.detail: Pushdown 80 lb × 12  +  Hammer Curl 25 lb × 10–12 · 3 rounds
exercises.note: Rotated bicep to hammer curls for variety. Skull crusher stays OFF until the back is fully clear. Elbows pinned.

exercises.name: Core Circuit (Back-Safe)
exercises.detail: Plank Shoulder Tap 10/side → Dead Bugs 8–10/side → Pallof Press 40 lb × 10/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: All back-safe. Different combo than last upper session. Lower back pressed flat on dead bugs; brace hard on the pallof.
